race.comment: Loads of chances. MISS DECEIVER (8) is close to a win and returned with a big run, missing out by less than a length. Fitter again and expected to go close. PROFILE (11) is a former Cummings galloper who placed on debut last winter and hasn't raced since. Resumes for the Hayes yard on the back of a host of hit-outs and won the latest. Returns with the blinkers on and no surprise to see her off the mark. BOYD (3) was well fancied fresh over 1000m and worked home strongly to place. Fitter again and will be tough to beat. WEASEL SEA (6) placed on debut and was thereabouts last time when fourth. Has upside and is among the chances. FINANCE WORK (4) started huge odds at debut but ran very well for a close-up fourth. Could be overs again.
